name: Toho Kinzoku Co., Ltd.
summary: Toho Kinzoku Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells tungsten, molybdenum, and refractory metal products in Japan. Its products include tungsten/molybdenum products, such as wires, rods, plates, sheet processed products, discharge lamp electrodes, electron tube electrodes, discharge needles, and high temperature atmosphere parts; molybdenum parts for magnetron; copper tungsten heat sinks; tungsten and molybdenum alloy products; TIG welding rods; and welding tungsten electrode rods. The company also offers cemented carbide products, electrical contact products, civil engineering tools, product manufacturing machinery and equipment, and rare metal alloy products. Its products are primarily used for powder metallurgy and machining. Toho Kinzoku Co. was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
